name: Pranjal Sharma
headline: Interaction Designer
statement: I design interfaces that translate complexity into calm — bridging human intuition with emerging systems.
education: Bachelor of Arts in Interaction Design · ZHdK
philosophy: Growing up between Delhi and Zurich taught me that good interaction design listens before it responds. I work at the intersection of research, motion, and experimental interfaces — building digital experiences that feel considered, not clever for its own sake.
